name: YETI Holdings, Inc.
description: YETI Holdings, Inc. is an American company headquartered in Austin, Texas, that designs, markets, and distributes premium outdoor recreation products. The company is widely recognized for its high-performance ice chests, vacuum-insulated stainless-steel drinkware, soft coolers, bags, and various outdoor accessories. Founded in 2006, YETI has built a strong brand reputation among outdoor enthusiasts, professionals, and consumers who value durability and innovation. The company operates globally, selling its products through a multi-channel strategy that includes direct-to-consumer e-commerce platforms and a network of premium retail partners across North America, Europe, Australia, and Asia.
